title: BarkinMad Coins in ZXBrick
description: How shared BarkinMad Coins behavior is represented in ZXBrick, where gameplay rewards support unlock progression and shared cross-title rewards inside the ZX Series ecosystem.
summary: BarkinMad Coins are shared within the ZX Series model and are used as a progression-oriented reward currency.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series documentation asset

images.alt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series reference

sections.heading: What it is
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared progression token model across supported ZX Series titles.
In ZXBrick, they connect gameplay participation with broader unlock opportunities.

sections.heading: How it helps progression
paragraphs: Treat coins as a long-term loop, not a one-off bonus.
When planning sessions, include coin progression in your weekly targets alongside levels and scores.

faq.question: Do BarkinMad Coins have real-world value?
faq.answer: BarkinMad Coins are documented as in-app progression currency and have no cash value.
